<!-- Claudesy's vision, brought to life. -->
---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behaviour on the Puskesmas Balowerti website
title: "fix: [short description of the bug]"
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll to '...'
4. Observe error

## Expected Behaviour

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

A clear description of what actually happens.

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the issue.

## Environment

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Device | Desktop / Mobile / Tablet |
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 15, iOS 18, Android 15 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 130, Firefox 132, Safari 18 |
| Viewport Width | e.g. 375px, 1280px |
| URL | e.g. https://puskesmas-website-production.up.railway.app |

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (console errors, network errors, etc.).

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] I have provided steps to reproduce the issue.
- [ ] This is not a security vulnerability (if it is, please follow the [Security Policy](../../SECURITY.md) instead).
